title: agrostis subspicata
intro: Agrostis subspicata, also known as red top bentgrass, is a perennial grass species found in temperate regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis subspicata include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Agrostis subspicata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for consumption, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
